h4: Amount of data in memory: {{usuarios.length}} without virtual scroll

div.style: background: #2a0000; border: 1px solid #ff4444; color: #ff6666; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; font-family: monospace; border-radius: 4px;

div: ⚠️ PERFORMANCE WARNING: Rendering 100k physical nodes without Virtual Scroll will consume slightly over 2.7GB of RAM. This brute-force test was designed to benchmark the V8 engine's stress limits and will freeze mobile devices due to memory exhaustion (OOM Killer). Proceed at your own risk.
